items.title: Marketing attribution pipelines
items.description: Campaign and channel fields (nominal, low cardinality) are one-hot encoded inside a sklearn Pipeline; UTM source with thousands of variants gets frequency encoding and rare-level bucketing before gradient boosting.

items.title: Retail demand forecasting
items.description: Store format (small/medium/large) uses ordinal encoding; product department trees with moderate cardinality use ColumnTransformer one-hot branches paired with numeric lag features in a single serialized model artifact.

items.title: Real-time fraud scoring
items.description: High-cardinality device fingerprints are hash-encoded or target-encoded with cross-validated statistics; the fitted ColumnTransformer ships beside the classifier for low-latency batch scoring.

items.title: HR attrition analytics
items.description: Job family and office location columns go through per-column encoding decisions in a notebook prototype, then the same ColumnTransformer configuration is promoted to a production Pipeline after CV confirms cardinality choices.
